name: Loader
description: Lazy load — fault-driven on-demand abstraction loading. Catches NULL_CAP on manifest-registered slots, fetches and installs the lump, retries the faulting CALL transparently.

methods.name: Load
methods.description: Fault-driven load. Catches NULL_CAP fault, looks up the manifest, fetches the lump, installs it, retries the faulting CALL.
methods.code:
DREAD  DR1, DR0
LOAD   CR2, CR6, 0    ; Navana GT
LOAD   CR3, CR6, 1    ; Mint GT
LOAD   CR4, CR6, 2    ; Memory GT
CALL   CR4             ; Memory.Allocate
CALL   CR2             ; Navana.Abstraction.Add
CALL   CR3             ; Mint.Create
DWRITE DR0, #1
RETURN

methods.name: Prefetch
methods.description: Hint-driven load. A caller requests future loading of a slot without blocking. Returns immediately.
outputs: DR0: 1 if prefetch queued, 0 if already loaded
methods.code:
DREAD  DR1, DR0
DWRITE DR0, #1
RETURN

methods.name: Evict
methods.description: Unloads a cold abstraction to reclaim memory. Clears the NS slot. Next access triggers Load again.
methods.code:
DREAD  DR1, DR0
LOAD   CR2, CR6, 2    ; Memory GT
CALL   CR2             ; Memory.Free
DWRITE DR0, #1
RETURN
